meta.title: For Players | PADEL2GO – Book courts, earn P2G credits, redeem rewards
meta.description: With PADEL2GO you book courts in seconds, earn P2G credits and redeem them in the marketplace.

video.placeholder: Video configurable in the admin panel

hero.description: Book a court in seconds, AI analyses your match, P2G Points land automatically in your wallet — redeemable for equipment, court time and more.

ecosystem.subtitle: Every booking, every match, every point counts – automatically.

steps.title: Book a court in seconds
steps.desc: Pick a location, grab a slot, pay — all in the app or in your browser.

steps.title: AI captures your game
steps.desc: Wingfield cameras track heatmaps, shots and match score — live, automatically.

steps.title: Collect P2G Points
steps.desc: The better you play, the more points you earn. Redeemable for equipment, court time and events.

appHub.subtitle: Book courts, track stats, redeem rewards — all in one place.

features.title: Book in under 30 seconds
features.desc: Pick a location, grab a slot, pay — straight from the app or your browser.

features.title: Stats, heatmaps & match analysis

ki.description: Wingfield AI cameras capture every ball, every step, every decision — fully automatic, without sensors, without manual input. The result: Match IQ reports, speed & placement data, head-to-head stats and a measurable skill benchmark straight in your app.

features.title: Match IQ Report
features.desc: Winners, errors & successful strategies, automatically broken down after every match.

features.title: Speed & placement
features.desc: Speed and placement of every ball measured — see just how much pressure you build.

features.title: Head-to-head stats
features.desc: Direct comparison against every opponent: where do you win, where do you lose points?

features.title: Skill Assessment (WSA)
features.desc: AI benchmark across serve, return, drive, drop, volley and dink — measurably standardised.

features.title: Auto clip generation
features.desc: Your best rallies are automatically cut and saved.

features.title: Drills & leaderboards
features.desc: Curated training sets from pros, scored with a drill score of 0–100. Community rankings included.

ki.howItWorksText: At our locations, Wingfield cameras are installed that capture your game fully automatically — no QR code to scan, no setup. The AI analyses every rally in real time, recognises shot types, measures speed & placement and produces a complete Match IQ report after every match. On request, the Wingfield Skill Assessment (WSA) rates your level measurably across serve, return, drive, drop, volley and dink.
ki.ctaNote: We'll let you know as soon as AI analysis goes live at your location.
